# Herder

*1744 – 1803 · German · [Romanticism](../movements/romanticism.md)*

German philosopher and theologian, a leading figure of the Counter-Enlightenment: he holds that each people has its own genius, inscribed in its language and traditions, and that humanity exists only in the plural of its cultures.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
